Modern Amenities: Guests enjoy free WiFi, air-conditioning, and a 24-hour front desk. Additional facilities include an outdoor seating area, family rooms, culture classes, live music, bicycle parking, and express check-in and check-out services.
Local Attractions: Karpinjan Beach is a 6-minute walk away, while Aquapark Istralandia lies 7 km from the property. The Euphrasian Basilica and PoreÄ Main Square are 20 km distant, and Aquapark Aquacolours PoreÄ is 21 km away.

Spacious Accommodation: Apartmen ARMINAN 52 TERRACE in Novigrad offers a spacious apartment with two bedrooms and a living room. The property features a balcony with sea views, air-conditioning, and a fully equipped kitchen.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests can enjoy an infinity swimming pool, sun terrace, and a lush garden. Free WiFi is available throughout the apartment, ensuring connectivity. Additional amenities include a lift, electric vehicle charging station, and outdoor seating area.
Convenient Location: Located 71 km from Pula Airport, the apartment is an 18-minute walk from Karpinjan Beach. Nearby attractions include Aquapark Istralandia (5 km), The Euphrasian Basilica and PoreÄ Main Square (20 km each).
